qa_pairs.question: How do you enable updating of Discrete Phase Model (DPM) source terms every flow iteration in Ansys Fluent?
qa_pairs.answer: To enable updating DPM source terms every flow iteration, open the Discrete Phase Model Dialog Box and select 'Interaction with Continuous Phase'. This setting can be saved in your .cas file or added via the journal file.

qa_pairs.question: What commands can be added to a journal file in Ansys Fluent to automate the setup of Discrete Phase Model (DPM) injections after solution initialization?
qa_pairs.answer: To automate DPM injection setup, commands such as the following can be added to the journal file after solution initialization: `/define/models/dpm/interaction/coupled-calculations yes`, `/define/models/dpm/injections/delete-injection injection-0:1`, `/define/models/dpm/injections/create injection-0:1 no yes file no zinjection01.inj no no no no`, `/define/models/dpm/injections/list-particles injection-0:1`, and `/define/models/dpm/injections/list-injection-properties injection-0:1`.
